tags.name: auth
tags.description: Authentication configuration and identity provider integration.

tags.name: users
tags.description: Local GameHub users and current-user profile routes.

post.description: Requires Idempotency-Key. Reusing the same key with a different payload returns 409.

patch.description: Requires If-Match with the current numeric version.

put.summary: Create or update an owner metafield value
put.description: Requires Idempotency-Key. If-Match is optional on create and used for optimistic updates.

post.description: Requires Idempotency-Key. The returned signed URL is used by the client to upload directly to S3-compatible storage.
Requires Idempotency-Key. Confirms the object exists in storage and transitions the asset to available.
Requires Idempotency-Key. Requires groups.create permission once auth is enforced.

get.description: Uses X-GameHub-User-Id until bearer authentication is implemented.

post.description: Deny-by-default permission check endpoint for trusted callers.

get.description: Returns frontend-safe OAuth and OIDC configuration for the single configured identity provider.
Requires bearer authentication. In development only, X-GameHub-Dev-User-ID can be used when development bypass is enabled.

patch.description: Updates local GameHub user settings only. Provider-owned username, email, credentials, MFA, and login identifiers cannot be updated here.

get.description: Returns a provider account settings URL when supported by the configured provider. GameHub does not update provider-owned identity fields directly.

CorrelationId.description: Correlation identifier shared across related work.

ETag.description: Numeric resource version wrapped as an entity tag.

RateLimitLimit.description: Maximum requests allowed in the current window.

RateLimitRemaining.description: Remaining requests in the current window.

RateLimitReset.description: Unix timestamp when the current limit window resets.

DevUserIDHeader.name: X-GameHub-Dev-User-ID
DevUserIDHeader.description: Development-only local user bypass header. Ignored outside development and not a production auth mechanism.

PreconditionRequired.description: A required precondition header is missing
